interpretation: A per-symbol cap prevented second entries when the bot was already long; this audit studies whether that should become a future add-on path.
Do not enable live add-ons from this file alone. Require shadow evidence and a separate route-policy change if the user chooses to proceed.
A clean Gill-style setup should show deep bullish support below, meaningful overhead not immediately on top of price, and repeat-fire confirmation after the first position.
purpose: Study same-symbol repeat fires after an existing long position to decide whether a future controlled add-on route is justified.

decision_reasons: repeat fire is worth studying as a controlled add-on
